properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: She is running A hundred miles an hour In the wrong direction She is trying But the canyon's ever-widening In the depths of her cold heart So she sets out on another misadventure just to find She's another two years older and she's three more steps behind

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Does anybody hear her? Can anybody see? Or does anybody even know she's going down today? Under the shadow of our steeple With all the lost and lonely people Searching for the hope that's tucked away in you and me Does anybody hear her? Can anybody see?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: She is yearning For shelter and affection That she never found at home She is searching For a hero to ride in To ride in and save the day And then walks in her prince charming And he knows just what to say Momentary lapse of reason And she gives herself away

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If judgment looms under every steeple With lofty glances from lofty people Who can't see past her scarlet letter And we've never even met her

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If judgment looms under every steeple If lofty glances from lofty people Can't see past her scarlet letter And we've never even met her Never even met her

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Does anybody hear her? Does anybody see? Or does anybody even know she's going down today? Under the shadow of our steeple With all the lost and lonely people Searching for the hope that's tucked away in you and me Does anybody hear her? Does anybody see? Does anybody even know she's going down today? Under the shadow of our steeple With all the lost and lonely people Searching for the hope that's tucked away in you and me Does anybody hear her? Does anybody see?

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: He is running a hundred miles an hour in the wrong direction
